zh.Barham Hall, Bury Saint Edmunds, Suffolk: 英國英格蘭素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲
zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecilia Sharington於1485年出生在英國諾福爾可可藍沃斯時，她的父親Thomas Sharington30歲，母親Elizabeth Southwell22歲。她於1498年與Sir Robert Southwell在英國英格蘭諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1551年10月13日在英國英格蘭諾福爾可享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecilia Sharington于1485年出生在英国諾福爾可可藍沃斯时，她的父亲Thomas Sharington30岁，母亲Elizabeth Southwell22岁。她于1498年与Sir Robert Southwell在英国英格兰諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1551年10月13日在英国英格兰諾福爾可享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sharington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Sherrington
meanings: English: locative name from Sherington (Bucks), Sherrington in Selmeston (Sussex), or possibly Sherrington (Wilts).

nameMeanings.name: Cecilia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

variants.name: Cecelia
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Cecilia Sharington was born in 1485, in Cranworth, Norfolk, England, her father, Thomas Sharington, was 30 and her mother, Elizabeth Southwell, was 22. She married Sir Robert Southwell in 1498, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 13 October 1551, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecilia Sharington est née en 1485, à Cranworth, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Sharington, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Southwell, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert Southwell en 1498, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 13 octobre 1551, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans.

Sie hat 1498 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Sir Robert Southwell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 13. ko.Barham Hall, Bury Saint Edmunds, Suffolk: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈
ko.lifeSummary: Cecilia Sharington(이)가 1485년 영국 노르폴크 크랜워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Sharington(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Southwell(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1498년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 Sir Robert Southwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1551년 10월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Sir Robert Southwell em 1498, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. ru.Barham Hall, Bury Saint Edmunds, Suffolk: бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecilia Sharington родилась в 1485 г. в местности кранворт, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Sharington было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Southwell, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Southwell в 1498 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 13 октября 1551 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет.
